scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client; npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && echo \"Root build: (server has no build step)\"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
